issues.message: claude has unobserved permission scopes, so its effective runtime posture is unverified.
issues.guidance: Inspect the documented claude user, managed, and session scopes before treating this posture as aligned.

issues.message: express version declaration is not comparable (range); no staleness claim is made.
issues.guidance: Pin an exact stable version to enable baseline comparison; APC makes no staleness claim for non-comparable declarations.

issues.message: react 999.0.0 is newer than APC's pinned baseline 19.2.7 (as of 2026-07-04); current docs may help.
issues.guidance: Consider curated MCP candidate ids: docs-current-frameworks. APC recommends only; install and configuration are deferred to the user.

issues.message: tabnine has a documented manual permission-posture limitation.
issues.guidance: Follow the documented tabnine setup guidance; Agent Profile Compiler does not claim this client is configured automatically.
